message:
feat(web): add WorkerComparisonView for side-by-side worker analysis

Implements the Worker Comparison View (bead wl9) with:
- WorkerComparisonView container with URL-based sharing
- WorkerSelector dropdown with multi-select and "Top 3" quick action
- ComparisonTable with best-in-category highlighting
- ComparisonRadar chart using Recharts RadarChart
- Comparison utility functions with unit tests (25 tests)

Features:
- Compare up to 4 workers side-by-side
- Shareable comparison URLs via query params
- Radar chart for visual performance profile comparison
- Best-in-category trophy indicators
- Responsive layout (stacks on mobile)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
